# A-Frame — vendored provenance
- Upstream: https://github.com/aframevr/aframe (MIT) · aframe.io
- Version: 1.7.1 (bundles super-three@0.173.5 = three r173)
- Source: cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aframe@1.7.1/dist/aframe.min.js
- Vendored VERBATIM. κ-addressable: pinned dual-axis in os-closure, L5-served, LAZY-loaded on enter (~1.28MB).
- Witness: tools/holo-aframe-witness.mjs. Integration: usr/lib/holo/holo-world.mjs. Demo: apps/surfacedemo/world.html.
